description_long: This is a weathered, cylindrical metal barrel with a flat, tightly fitted lid. The surface is heavily rusted and stained, showing signs of prolonged outdoor exposure and use, with faded yellow markings and remnants of text visible on the sides. The coloration is predominantly brown and gray, with patches of yellow and darker streaks from corrosion and grime. The barrel lacks any visible handles or reinforcement bands, giving it a simple, utilitarian appearance. The lid appears to be made of the same material as the body and fits flush with the rim, suggesting it is designed to keep contents secure. This object is typical of those found in industrial or urban outdoor environments, possibly used for storage or waste collection.
description: A rusted, cylindrical metal barrel with a flat, fitted lid and faded yellow markings, showing heavy weathering and grime.
description_view_0: Front view shows the barrel's flat lid, prominent rust stains, and faded yellow vertical stripes and partial text.
description_view_1: This side reveals more of the yellow markings and text, with visible streaks of corrosion and grime running down the surface.
description_view_2: The barrel's surface here is more uniformly rusted, with only faint traces of yellow and no clear markings.
description_view_3: This view displays the most worn and featureless side, dominated by brown and gray corrosion with minimal visible markings.
